title: Diplomatic Visa Arrangement (DVA)
body: "Overview   The Diplomatic Visa Arrangement (DVA) is a UK visitor visa for people who have diplomatic passports from:    China  Indonesia  South Africa  Turkey  Vietnam    You must apply for a DVA visa before travelling to the UK.    This visa is for official diplomatic visits, but you can also use it for personal travel.   Who can apply   You can apply if you:     have a valid diplomatic passport from one of the eligible countries    are aged 18 or over    have a written notification (Note Verbale) from your government confirming your name, date of birth, passport number and role to support your application     You do not need to apply if:    you are exempt from immigration control (you should apply for an exempt vignette instead)    What you can do with this visa   With a DVA visa, you can:    visit the UK for up to 6 months at a time  enter the UK multiple times during the 2-year validity period    You cannot:    settle in the UK  study  work or switch to another visa route    How to apply   You must apply online.   Start now   You need to click on Exempt Vignette and put in the country you are applying from. You can then choose Diplomatic Visa Arrangement from the list.   You’ll need to:    upload a digital photo that meets UK passport standards  submit your diplomatic passport at a visa application centre (VAC) (this must be the original version, not a photocopy)  provide a Note Verbale from your government    You or someone authorised by your government (such as a delegate from your Ministry of Foreign Affairs) must submit your documents in person at a VAC.    Note Verbale   The Note Verbale must:    be written by the government that’s sending you    It must include:    your name, date of birth, role and passport number  confirmation that the government that’s sending you supports the application    How much it costs    It’s free to apply for a Diplomatic Visa Arrangement.  After you apply   The VAC will email you with your decision within 10 working days.   If your application is successful, you’ll get a visa valid for 2 years. You can visit the UK multiple times, but each visit must be no longer than 6 months.   There is no limit on how often you can visit.   You cannot extend this visa. If it expires, you must apply again. "
